reading.label: B
paragraphs: Today is Omar's first day at his new *job*. He works at a big shop in the city. He wakes up early and wears a clean *uniform*. He feels happy but a little nervous. He wants to do good work and make his *manager* happy.

At the shop, a kind *colleague* named Sami says hello. Sami shows Omar the *office* and the shelves. He gives Omar his first *task*: to help the customers find things. Omar learns fast because he has good *skills*. He listens well and asks questions.

After three hours, Omar takes a short *break*. He drinks tea and talks with the *team*. Everyone is friendly. At the end of the day, the manager says, 'Good job, Omar!' Omar smiles. He is happy in his new *career*. He knows that with hard work, he can learn more every day.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: Omar's first day at a new job
questions.correct_answer: Omar's first day at a new job
questions.explanation_ar: النص كله عن أول يوم لعمر في وظيفته الجديدة.

questions.question_en: What does Omar wear to work?
questions.explanation_ar: قال النص إنه يلبس زيّاً نظيفاً (uniform).

questions.question_en: Who says hello to Omar at the shop?
questions.question_ar: من الذي يُلقي التحية على عمر في المحل؟
questions.explanation_ar: زميله في العمل (colleague) سامي هو من رحّب به.

choices: A job or piece of work to do
questions.correct_answer: A job or piece of work to do
questions.explanation_ar: كلمة task تعني مهمة أو شغل يجب أن تعمله.
تعلّم بسرعة لأن عنده مهارات جيدة (skills) — يستمع ويسأل.

questions.question_en: What does Omar do after three hours?
questions.question_ar: ماذا يفعل عمر بعد ثلاث ساعات؟
questions.explanation_ar: بعد ثلاث ساعات أخذ استراحة قصيرة (break).

questions.question_en: How does Omar feel at the end of the day?
questions.question_ar: بماذا يشعر عمر في نهاية اليوم؟
questions.explanation_ar: في النهاية ابتسم وشعر بالسعادة في مهنته الجديدة (career).

vocab: the work a person does to earn money
Omar started his new job today.
special clothes you wear for work
He wears a clean uniform at the shop.
the person who leads the workers
The manager said good job to Omar.
a piece of work you must do
Omar's first task is to help customers.
a group of people who work together
the work you do for many years
Omar is happy in his new career.

listening.title_en: A Manager Talks About Her Job
listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Nora. I work in an office in the city. I am a manager. Every morning I say hello to my team. I give them their tasks for the day. I like my job because I help new workers learn. My best skill is talking to people. I feel happy in my career.

exercises.explanation_ar: قالت نورة إنها تعمل في مكتب (office) في المدينة.

exercises.question_en: What does Nora do every morning?
options: She says hello to her team
exercises.explanation_ar: كل صباح تُلقي التحية على فريقها (team).

exercises.question_en: What does she give her team?
Why does Nora like her job?
options: Because she helps new workers learn
exercises.explanation_ar: تحب وظيفتها لأنها تساعد العمال الجدد على التعلّم.
أفضل مهارة (skill) عندها هي التحدّث مع الناس.
